docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: NO WRITTEN LEASE AND DAILY RENTAL VALUE ($26.66). FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MARIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTILLO, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUIRRE, MONICA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1429 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, (GROUND FLOOR LEVEL), CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
